patch.raw_yaml:
- hosts: all
  become: true
  tasks:
    - name: Install curl (succeeds)
      apt:
        name: curl
        state: present
        update_cache: yes

    - name: Create a working directory (succeeds)
      file:
        path: /opt/myapp
        state: directory
        mode: '0755'

    - name: Install a package that does not exist (fails)
      apt:
        name: nonexistent-package-aegis-xyz-999
        state: present
      ignore_errors: true

    - name: Write a marker file only if previous task succeeded (never runs)
      copy:
        dest: /opt/myapp/ready
        content: "ok"
      when: false
